reviews.comment:
Los empleados pavean mucho y se toman mucho tiempo y no estan atentos a la fila de autos que se les forma . No les Importa mucho el trabajo.

(Translated by Google)
The employees are very lazy and take a long time, and they're not paying attention to the line of cars that's forming. They don't seem to care much about their work.
